{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-26x","title":"Add study plan and comprehension questions for CotuLenh rules","description":"Add a structured reading/review plan based on docs/cotulenh-rules.md, covering normal movement, capture types, terrain and blocking, every piece and mechanic, plus a 10-question comprehension set with answers fully inferable from the rules docs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-09T11:40:07Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-09T11:40:07Z"}

{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-frh","title":"Operationalize CotuLenh rules docs into curriculum and validation assets","description":"Break follow-up work from docs/cotulenh-rules.md and docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md into implementation beads. {"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-k79","title":"Add learn coverage for game-state and Last Guard rules","description":"Expand the learn curriculum to cover core-enforced rules that are not currently represented as dedicated learn subjects or lessons, especially check versus commander danger, checkmate, stalemate, commander captured, repetition and fifty-move draw rules, and Last Guard promotion.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-09T11:33:31Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-09T11:33:31Z"}

{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-frh.2","title":"Add FEN-based advanced assessment set to the CotuLenh rules study plan","description":"Implement the Suggested Next Step from docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md by adding a second question set based on concrete FEN positions. Each item should ask the learner to classify outcomes such as legal move, illegal move, legal capture, illegal capture, legal combine, illegal combine, legal deploy, illegal deploy, check, and commander danger without check, using the rules reference as the answer source.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-09T11:48:23Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-09T11:48:23Z"}

{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-frh.3","title":"Turn the CotuLenh rules study plan into a reusable lesson QA checklist","description":"Use the review logic, piece-by-piece checklist, and mechanic review checklist from docs/cotulenh-rules-study-plan.md to create a repeatable QA rubric for lesson authors and reviewers. The output should help future rule-doc or learn-lesson changes confirm that each piece, terrain rule, capture mode, blocking rule, air-defense interaction, deploy behavior, heroic rule, flying-general rule, and game-state concept is still covered coherently.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-09T11:48:35Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-09T11:48:35Z"}

{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-frh.1","title":"Add worked examples for CotuLenh complex rules interactions","description":"Implement the rules-doc follow-up to add concrete example material for the hardest mechanics called out in docs/cotulenh-rules.md. The output can be lesson examples, diagrams, test fixtures, or reusable docs assets, but it should make these mechanics teachable and regression-testable.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-09T11:48:23Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-09T11:48:23Z"}

{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-331","title":"Add validate-move rematch integration tests","description":"Story 3.8 still lacks Deno-level validate-move tests that exercise rematch_offer/rematch_accept/rematch_decline flows against the edge-function handler or extracted server logic. {"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-0iw","title":"Fix web check-types route type include breakage","description":"Running 'pnpm --filter @cotulenh/web run check-types' fails because tsconfig.json includes .next/types/**/*.ts entries that reference missing generated files such as .next/types/app/(app)/dashboard/page.ts and other route/typegen outputs. Reproduce from repo root, align next typegen output with tsconfig include patterns, and make check-types pass reliably in a clean workspace.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-23T16:19:25Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-23T16:19:25Z"}

{"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-8bb","title":"Fix learn lesson page build failure from dynamic ssr:false in server component","description":"Running 'pnpm --filter @cotulenh/web run build' fails in apps/cotulenh/web/src/app/(public)/learn/[subject]/[id]/page.tsx because next/dynamic is used with { ssr: false } in a Server Component. {"id":"cotulenh-monorepo-5zq","title":"Fix story 3.9 review regressions in reconnect restore and timeout result UX","description":"Code review on Story 3.9 found two concrete regressions in the reconnect/disconnect implementation: (1) reconnect restore currently falls back to connected state when the authoritative snapshot fetch fails, which can re-enable stale local gameplay after a disconnect; (2) disconnect-forfeit outcomes are not rendered with a disconnect-specific result reason in the game result banner, so timeout victories/losses can show the wrong reason text. Patch the reconnect state machine, add focused tests, and land the UI/result mapping fix.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mnoy.dev@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-23T17:47:50Z","created_by":"Hoang Manh","updated_at":"2026-03-23T17:47:50Z"}
